title: High Resolution Experimental Fashion Editorial Poster

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a vertical high-resolution experimental fashion editorial poster. 【Theme】: silent couture archive 【Brand name】: Vellum Atelier 【Collection title】: Ghost Trace 【Fashion / product direction】: transparent layered outerwear and sculptural accessories 【Main color palette】: pale ash, pearl white, graphite, and cold silver 【Model direction】: an adult high-fashion model with calm distant presence 【Editorial copy】: A quiet study of material, motion, and memory. The image should feel like a high-end, cold, minimal and experimental fashion magazine poster. Use a large pale grey-white negative-space background with subtle paper grain, low-contrast noise and printed editorial texture. Avoid clean plastic white backgrounds or commercial studio backdrops. The main subject is an adult high-fashion model with calm distant presence, shown in a full-body or nearly full-body pose, placed slightly right of center. The pose should feel quiet, restrained, distant and editorial. The model should have a calm expression and high-fashion presence. Avoid influencer posing, exaggerated performance or commercial catalog energy. The clothing or product must have strong design value, clear silhouette and rich material details: sheer fabric, crinkled texture, soft volume, leather reflection, knit texture, structured tailoring, transparent layers, natural folds or subtle shine. Keep the person realistic, with natural skin texture and no plastic AI face. Add a controlled “ghost scan blur” effect: vertical motion trails, translucent afterimages, stretched scan lines, slight glitch displacement and soft dissolving blur around the left side of the body, lower garment edges, arms, shoes or product edges. The effect should look like the person, garment or product has been optically scanned, folded by paper texture, or dragged by memory. Important: keep the face or upper body relatively clear as the visual anchor. Do not blur the entire person. The key contrast is: clear emotional anchor + blurred ghost trace around the edges. If the theme includes a product such as perfume, jewelry, bags or shoes, place it subtly near the model, at the bottom of the poster or in the foreground. Connect the product with the model through reflection, transparent blur, liquid trace, glass distortion or scan-like afterimages. Do not make it look like a normal e-commerce product image. Use a minimal fashion magazine layout: small English title at the top, such as “Vellum Atelier / Ghost Trace”; a small paragraph of editorial copy near the body or product; and a tiny abstract logo at the bottom. Typography should be clean, restrained, small, high-end and sans-serif. Avoid large promotional text, loud fonts or ad-like design. Overall mood: low saturation, low contrast, cold, quiet, premium, experimental, editorial, archive-like, independent designer lookbook, avant-garde fashion magazine, artistic brand campaign. Avoid: cartoon, illustration, cheap poster design, e-commerce ad, promotional banner, large text, complex background, multiple random people, collage grid, over-sharpening, over-retouched skin, obvious AI look.
